skills.name: GitHub
skills.description: Interact with GitHub using the `gh` CLI. Use `gh issue`, `gh pr`, `gh run`, and `gh api` for issues, PRs, CI runs, and advanced queries.

skills.name: Frontend Design
skills.description: Frontend development with React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS. Build landing pages, dashboards, forms, components. Responsive, accessible, performant UI.

skills.name: Code Gen
skills.description: 基于docs/output技术方案文档的生产级Java代码自动生成。自动读取技术方案、接口规范、业务规则，严格按项目分层架构生成可直接上线的代码。

skills.name: Agent Browser
skills.description: A fast Rust-based headless browser automation CLI with Node.js fallback that enables AI agents to navigate, click, type, and snapshot pages via structured commands.

skills.name: TDD
skills.description: Test-driven development workflow. Write tests first, then implement. Supports Jest, Vitest, and Pytest frameworks with auto-watch and coverage reporting.

skills.name: Copywriting
skills.description: AI-powered copywriting assistant. Generate marketing copy, product descriptions, email campaigns, social media posts, and ad creative with brand voice consistency.

skills.name: Excel XLSX
skills.description: Generate, read, and manipulate Excel spreadsheets programmatically. Create reports, dashboards, data exports with formatting, charts, and pivot tables.

skills.name: Weather
skills.description: Get current weather and forecasts for any location. Supports temperature, humidity, wind, UV index, and severe weather alerts.
